durable_improvement: Added a fail-closed Cloudflare adapter that computes the exact deployment-proof digest once, maps existing verification outputs into four normalized trust decisions, requires same-subject composition through the Frontier Research promotion gate, and refuses promotion unless the existing deployment acceptance decision also accepts.
verification: Five deterministic tests passed in an isolated Node runtime using byte-equivalent committed logic.

Add cloudflare-evidence-promotion-decision.json to the atomic deployment manifest and uploaded artifact set.
Configure CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment.
Dispatch the workflow and retain resolving URL, served identity, exact commit, control-plane metadata, and promotion decision evidence.
